name: The Links at Trek
about: The Links at Trek is a virtual golf simulator venue combined with a brewery and restaurant. The facility features spacious bays equipped with simulators, staff assistance for setup and service, and regular ball and tee provision. It operates Wednesday through Sunday and offers membership options starting at $30 per month. The venue is located on the border of Granville and Newark, providing a unique experience that blends golf with food and drink.
why_golfers_like_it: Full-service bar and restaurant accessible during play
Spacious bays accommodating up to 6 people
Staff assistance for setup and service

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available, can order any food served in the restaurant side
Full bar service with beer from the brewery

faq.question: Do I need to bring clubs?
faq.answer: You are free to bring your own clubs, but they must be clean of dirt and debris. Club rentals are available for $10.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, external food and drinks are not allowed. The venue has a full bar and kitchen where you can order food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The exact time for an 18-hole round is not specified, but bay sessions accommodate up to 6 people and can be booked through their online system.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and allows children. The spacious bays and full-service restaurant make it suitable for families.
